summary: The diff implements most of the five requirements. REQ-1 (backend profile storage), REQ-2 (header avatar/name), REQ-3 (profile panel with edit mode), REQ-4 (AvailabilityCalendar embedded in panel), and REQ-5 (registration form wiring) are all substantially addressed. However, several specific acceptance criteria have gaps: the backend getMyProfile endpoint name differs from the spec, stable storage persistence is not verifiable from the diff, and a migration module was added without being requested.

missing_requirements.requirement: Expose a getMyProfile endpoint (named exactly getMyProfile per spec). The diff exposes getCallerUserProfile instead.
missing_requirements.reason: The spec requires the endpoint to be named getMyProfile, but backend/main.mo and useQueries.ts reference getCallerUserProfile consistently.

missing_requirements.requirement: Data persists across canister upgrades via stable storage.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff does not show stable variable declarations for the userProfiles map in backend/main.mo. The truncated diff does not confirm stable storage is used.

missing_requirements.requirement: Validation errors are shown inline if required fields are empty.
missing_requirements.reason: The UserProfilePanel defines an EditFormErrors interface but the truncated diff does not show complete inline error rendering for all required fields in the edit form.

hallucinated_features.description: A backend/migration.mo module was added that attempts to migrate old UserProfile shapes to the new schema.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention creating a migration module or migrating legacy profile data. This is an unrequested addition.
